member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: Authentication and user management endpoints

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Controllers.AuthController.Login(BoardSync.Api.Shared.Auth.DTOs.LoginRequest)
member.summary: Authenticate user and return JWT tokens
member.returns: Authentication response with access token and user profile

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Controllers.AuthController.Register(BoardSync.Api.Shared.Auth.DTOs.RegisterRequest)
member.summary: Register a new user account
member.returns: User creation result and optional email confirmation requirement
member.response: Registration failed due to validation errors

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Controllers.AuthController.Logout
member.summary: Log out the current user and invalidate refresh token

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Controllers.AuthController.RefreshToken(BoardSync.Api.Shared.Auth.DTOs.RefreshTokenRequest)
member.summary: Refresh JWT access token using refresh token
member.param: Optional refresh token in request body (will use cookie if not provided)

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Controllers.AuthController.RevokeToken(BoardSync.Api.Controllers.RevokeTokenRequest)
member.summary: Revoke a refresh token to prevent future use
member.param: Optional token to revoke (will use cookie if not provided)

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Controllers.AuthController.ForgotPassword(BoardSync.Api.Shared.Auth.DTOs.ForgotPasswordRequest)
member.summary: Request password reset email for forgot password
member.response: Password reset email sent (or user not found message for security)

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Controllers.AuthController.ResetPassword(BoardSync.Api.Shared.Auth.DTOs.ResetPasswordRequest)
member.summary: Reset user password using reset token

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Controllers.AuthController.ConfirmEmail(BoardSync.Api.Shared.Auth.DTOs.ConfirmEmailRequest)
member.summary: Confirm user email address using confirmation token
member.response: Invalid token or email already confirmed

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Controllers.AuthController.ResendConfirmation(BoardSync.Api.Controllers.ResendConfirmationRequest)
member.summary: Resend email confirmation for unconfirmed accounts
member.response: Email not found or already confirmed

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Controllers.AuthController.ChangePassword(BoardSync.Api.Shared.Auth.DTOs.ChangePasswordRequest)
member.summary: Change current user's password
member.response: Invalid current password or validation errors

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Controllers.AuthController.GetProfile
member.summary: Get current user's profile information

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Controllers.AuthController.UpdateProfile(BoardSync.Api.Shared.Auth.DTOs.UpdateProfileRequest)
member.summary: Update current user's profile information

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Controllers.RevokeTokenRequest
member.summary: Request to revoke a specific refresh token
member.param: Refresh token to revoke (optional, will use cookie if not provided)

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Controllers.RevokeTokenRequest.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Request to revoke a specific refresh token
member.param: Refresh token to revoke (optional, will use cookie if not provided)

member.name: P:BoardSync.Api.Controllers.RevokeTokenRequest.Token
member.summary: Refresh token to revoke (optional, will use cookie if not provided)

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Controllers.ResendConfirmationRequest
member.summary: Request to resend email confirmation
member.param: Email address to resend confirmation to

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Controllers.ResendConfirmationRequest.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Request to resend email confirmation
member.param: Email address to resend confirmation to

member.name: P:BoardSync.Api.Controllers.ResendConfirmationRequest.Email
member.summary: Email address to resend confirmation to

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Controllers.UsersController
member.summary: User lookup endpoints — used primarily when inviting members to orgs/teams.

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Controllers.UsersController.GetById(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get a user's public profile by their ID.

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Controllers.UsersController.GetByEmail(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Search users by email address (exact match). Used by OrgAdmins when inviting users to an organization.

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Controllers.UsersController.GetMe(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get the currently authenticated user's own profile.

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Controllers.OrganizationsController
member.summary: Manage organizations (top-level tenant containers).

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Controllers.OrganizationsController.GetMyOrgs(BoardSync.Api.Shared.Kernel.PaginationQuery,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get all organizations the current user belongs to.

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Controllers.OrganizationsController.Create(BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.DTOs.CreateOrganizationRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Create a new organization. The caller automatically becomes OrgAdmin.

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Controllers.OrganizationsController.GetById(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get organization by ID.

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Controllers.OrganizationsController.GetBySlug(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get organization by slug.

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Controllers.OrganizationsController.Update(System.Guid,BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.DTOs.UpdateOrganizationRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Update organization details. Requires OrgAdmin.

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Controllers.OrganizationsController.AddMember(System.Guid,BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.DTOs.AddTeamMemberRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Add a user to the organization. Requires OrgAdmin.

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Controllers.OrganizationsController.RemoveMember(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Remove a user from the organization. Requires OrgAdmin.

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Controllers.OrganizationsController.UpdateMemberRole(System.Guid,System.Guid,BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Controllers.UpdateMemberRoleRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Update a member's role within this organization. Requires OrgAdmin. Valid roles: OrgAdmin, ProjectAdmin, TeamMember, Reader.

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Controllers.UpdateMemberRoleRequest
member.summary: Request body for updating a member's org-level role.

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Controllers.UpdateMemberRoleRequest.#ctor(BoardSync.Api.Modules.Rbac.Models.RoleType)
member.summary: Request body for updating a member's org-level role.

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Controllers.ProjectsController
member.summary: Manage projects within an organization.

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Controllers.ProjectsController.GetForOrg(System.Guid,BoardSync.Api.Shared.Kernel.PaginationQuery,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: List all projects in an organization.

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Controllers.ProjectsController.Create(System.Guid,BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.DTOs.CreateProjectRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Create a new project within an organization. Requires OrgAdmin.

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Controllers.ProjectsController.GetById(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get a project by ID.

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Controllers.ProjectsController.Update(System.Guid,BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.DTOs.UpdateProjectRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Update project details. Requires ProjectAdmin.

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Controllers.TeamsController
member.summary: Manage teams within a project.

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Controllers.TeamsController.GetForProject(System.Guid,BoardSync.Api.Shared.Kernel.PaginationQuery,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: List all teams in a project.

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Controllers.TeamsController.Create(System.Guid,BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.DTOs.CreateTeamRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Create a new team in a project. Requires ProjectAdmin.

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Controllers.TeamsController.GetById(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get a team by ID.

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Controllers.TeamsController.Update(System.Guid,BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.DTOs.UpdateTeamRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Update team details. Requires ProjectAdmin.

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Controllers.TeamsController.GetMembers(System.Guid,BoardSync.Api.Shared.Kernel.PaginationQuery,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get team members.

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Controllers.TeamsController.AddMember(System.Guid,BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.DTOs.AddTeamMemberRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Add a member to a team. Requires ProjectAdmin.

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Controllers.TeamsController.RemoveMember(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Remove a member from a team. Requires ProjectAdmin.

member.name: P:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.DTOs.CreateOrganizationRequest.Slug
member.summary: Optional slug — auto-generated from Name if not provided. Must be lowercase alphanumeric + hyphens.

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Models.Organization
member.summary: Top-level tenant container. A user can belong to multiple organizations.

member.name: P:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Models.Organization.Slug
member.summary: Unique URL-friendly identifier (slug).

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Models.OrganizationMembership
member.summary: Tracks that a user belongs to an organization (independent of project/team membership).

member.name: P:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Models.OrganizationMembership.JoinedAt
member.summary: When the user accepted/joined the organization.

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Models.Project
member.summary: A project lives inside an organization. Work items, boards and sprints are scoped to a project.

member.name: P:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Models.Project.Slug
member.summary: Unique slug within the organization (used in URLs).

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Models.Team
member.summary: A team within a project. Boards and iterations are scoped to a team.

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Modules.OrgProject.Models.TeamMembership
member.summary: Tracks that a user is a member of a team.

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Modules.Rbac.Models.RoleType
member.summary: Roles available in the system, ordered from most to least privileged within a scope.

member.name: F:BoardSync.Api.Modules.Rbac.Models.RoleType.OrgAdmin
member.summary: Can manage the entire organization: create/delete projects, manage all members.

member.name: F:BoardSync.Api.Modules.Rbac.Models.RoleType.ProjectAdmin
member.summary: Can manage a project: configure board, manage team members, create iterations.

member.name: F:BoardSync.Api.Modules.Rbac.Models.RoleType.TeamMember
member.summary: Full contributor on a team: create/edit/move work items, manage sprints.

member.name: F:BoardSync.Api.Modules.Rbac.Models.RoleType.Reader
member.summary: Read-only stakeholder: can view boards, backlogs, and reports but cannot mutate.

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Modules.Rbac.Models.RoleScope
member.summary: The scope at which a role assignment applies.

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Modules.Rbac.Models.RoleAssignment
member.summary: Assigns a role to a user within a specific scope (org/project/team). One user can hold different roles at different scopes.

member.name: P:BoardSync.Api.Modules.Rbac.Models.RoleAssignment.UserId
member.summary: The user this assignment belongs to.

member.name: P:BoardSync.Api.Modules.Rbac.Models.RoleAssignment.Role
member.summary: Role granted to the user.

member.name: P:BoardSync.Api.Modules.Rbac.Models.RoleAssignment.Scope
member.summary: Scope level at which this role applies.

member.name: P:BoardSync.Api.Modules.Rbac.Models.RoleAssignment.ScopeId
member.summary: The resource ID for the scope. For Scope=Organization this is the OrgId, for Scope=Project this is the ProjectId, for Scope=Team this is the TeamId.

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Modules.Rbac.Services.IRbacService.AssignRoleAsync(System.Guid,BoardSync.Api.Modules.Rbac.Models.RoleType,BoardSync.Api.Modules.Rbac.Models.RoleScope,System.Guid,System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Assign a role to a user at the given scope. Idempotent — if an identical assignment already exists it is returned unchanged.

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Modules.Rbac.Services.IRbacService.RemoveRoleAsync(System.Guid,BoardSync.Api.Modules.Rbac.Models.RoleType,BoardSync.Api.Modules.Rbac.Models.RoleScope,System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Remove a specific role assignment.

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Modules.Rbac.Services.IRbacService.HasRoleAsync(System.Guid,BoardSync.Api.Modules.Rbac.Models.RoleType,BoardSync.Api.Modules.Rbac.Models.RoleScope,System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Check whether a user holds at least at the given scope. A more-privileged role (lower enum value) satisfies a less-privileged requirement. OrgAdmin implicitly satisfies any project or team scope check within that org.

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Modules.Rbac.Services.IRbacService.GetUserRolesAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Return all role assignments for a user.

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Modules.Rbac.Services.IRbacService.GetScopeRolesAsync(BoardSync.Api.Modules.Rbac.Models.RoleScope,System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Return all role assignments for a specific scope resource.

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Shared.Auth.Attributes.RequireAuthenticationAttribute
member.summary: Requires the user to be authenticated

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Shared.Auth.Attributes.RequireEmailConfirmedAttribute
member.summary: Requires the user to have a confirmed email address

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Shared.Auth.Attributes.RequireActiveUserAttribute
member.summary: Requires the user to be active (not locked or deactivated)

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Shared.Auth.Attributes.RequireOwnershipAttribute
member.summary: Allows only users who own the resource or are administrators

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Shared.Auth.Attributes.RateLimitAttribute
member.summary: Rate limiting attribute for sensitive operations

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Shared.Kernel.BaseEntity
member.summary: Base class for all domain entities. Provides common audit fields.

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Shared.Kernel.Events.IDomainEvent
member.summary: Marker interface for all domain events published on the internal event bus.

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Shared.Kernel.Events.DomainEvent
member.summary: Base record for domain events — provides EventId and OccurredAt automatically.

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Shared.Kernel.Events.IEventBus
member.summary: In-process event bus abstraction. Modules publish events here; other modules subscribe to react without direct coupling.

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Shared.Kernel.Events.IEventBus.PublishAsync``1(``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Publish a domain event to all registered handlers.

member.name: M:BoardSync.Api.Shared.Kernel.Events.IEventBus.Subscribe``1(BoardSync.Api.Shared.Kernel.Events.IEventHandler{``0})
member.summary: Subscribe a handler for a specific event type.

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Shared.Kernel.Events.IEventHandler`1
member.summary: Handler for a specific domain event type.

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Shared.Kernel.Events.InMemoryEventBus
member.summary: Simple in-process event bus backed by the DI container. All handlers registered as IEventHandler<TEvent> in DI are resolved and invoked.

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Shared.Kernel.Exceptions.DomainException
member.summary: Base class for all domain-specific exceptions.

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Shared.Kernel.Exceptions.NotFoundException
member.summary: Thrown when a requested resource does not exist.

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Shared.Kernel.Exceptions.ForbiddenException
member.summary: Thrown when an operation is not permitted for the current user.

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Shared.Kernel.Exceptions.BusinessRuleException
member.summary: Thrown when business rules are violated.

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Shared.Kernel.Exceptions.ConflictException
member.summary: Thrown when a conflicting resource already exists.

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Shared.Kernel.PagedResult`1
member.summary: Generic paginated result wrapper used across all list endpoints.

member.name: T:BoardSync.Api.Shared.Kernel.PaginationQuery
member.summary: Query parameters for paginated requests.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a type. Example: T:Namespace.Outer+Inner`1 becomes T:Namespace.Outer.Inner`1

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName or for an indexer P:Namespace.ContainingType.Item(System.Int32)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property given its container type and property name. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a method (or constructor). For example: M:Namespace.ContainingType.MethodName(ParamType1,ParamType2)~ReturnType M:Namespace.ContainingType.#ctor(ParamType)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.GetTypeDocId(System.Type,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a documentation ID string for a type. This method handles nested types (replacing '+' with '.'), generic types, arrays, pointers, by-ref types, and generic parameters. The flag controls whether constructed generic type arguments are emitted, while controls whether the generic arity marker (e.g. "`1") is appended.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.NormalizeDocId(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a documentation comment ID to match the compiler-style format. Strips the return type suffix for ordinary methods but retains it for conversion operators.
member.param: The documentation comment ID to normalize.
